name: slack-triage
description: Scan Slack for messages that need your response — unanswered DMs, @mentions, thread replies, and questions directed at you — and deliver a prioritized summary.
author: agent-index

external_dependencies.access_required: Channel listing, message history reading, thread reading, user info lookup (slack_list_channels, slack_get_channel_history, slack_get_thread_replies, slack_get_users)
